title: Life-Guard
description: Review code, decisions, and artifacts through a multi-perspective committee and a domain expert safety guard, then synthesize a structured verdict.

skillMetadata.author: skilly-hand
skillMetadata.changelog: Added multi-perspective review skill with committee + safety guard synthesis; enables adversarial evaluation without permanent agent files; affects catalog skill coverage for review and quality workflows
skillMetadata.auto-invoke: Reviewing code, decisions, or artifacts where adversarial multi-perspective evaluation adds value
